dispatches.task: Fix XXE vulnerability in camt_parser.py XMLParser configuration. Disable external entities and implement schema validation.
dispatches.verify_cmd: bandit -r bankstatementparser/ -f json | python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load(sys.stdin); sys.exit(0 if not [i for i in data.get('results',[]) if i['issue_severity']=='HIGH'] else 1)"

dispatches.task: Update CI/CD pipeline with security scanning: add Bandit, CodeQL, pip-audit jobs. Update deprecated GitHub Actions to latest versions.
Add mypy type checking configuration and type annotations to all public methods. Fix type inconsistencies.
Update vulnerable dependencies: certifi to 2024.7.4, urllib3 to 2.2.2, requests to 2.32.0. Update poetry.lock and requirements.txt.
dispatches.verify_cmd: grep -q 'certifi==2024.7.4' requirements.txt && grep -q 'urllib3==2.2.2' requirements.txt && grep -q 'requests==2.32.0' requirements.txt

dispatches.task: Create comprehensive test suite covering security scenarios: malformed XML, path traversal, large files, invalid inputs. Achieve >90% coverage.
Add input validation to CLI and parsers: file path sanitization, size limits, format validation. Handle FileNotFoundError gracefully.
Set up integration testing with sample malformed financial data files. Validate error handling and security boundaries.
dispatches.verify_cmd: test -d tests/integration && find tests/integration -name '*.py' | wc -l | grep -q '^[1-9]'

dispatches.task: Review and document security practices for financial data handling. Add security policy and vulnerability reporting process.

1.name: Security Hardening
1.description: P0 tasks with no shared file conflicts run in parallel

2.name: Type Safety
2.description: P0 tasks that modify bank_statement_parsers.py run sequentially after stage 1

3.name: Dependencies & Tests
3.description: P1 tasks run in parallel after type safety is established

4.name: Validation Hardening
4.description: P2 tasks that modify parsers run after tests are in place

5.name: Integration & Compliance
5.description: P3 tasks run in parallel as final stage
